oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to ask Work IQ agents questions and receive responses and to use Work IQ Tools on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes read and write access to Microsoft 365 resources that are accessible to Work IQ agents and scoped to the signed-in user. Data will flow from the app to Microsoft 365 and from Microsoft 365 to the app.
oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Ask Work IQ agents on behalf of the user
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to ask Work IQ agents questions and receive responses and to use Work IQ Tools on your behalf. Data will flow from the app to Microsoft 365 and from Microsoft 365 to the app.

oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to ask Work IQ agents selected by your organization questions and receive responses and to use Work IQ Tools on behalf of the signed-in user. This includes read and write access to Microsoft 365 resources that are accessible to the selected Work IQ agents and scoped to the signed-in user. Data will flow from the app to Microsoft 365 and from Microsoft 365 to the app.
oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Ask selected Work IQ agents on behalf of the user
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to ask specific Work IQ agents selected by your organization, questions and receive responses and to use Work IQ Tools on your behalf. Data will flow from the app to Microsoft 365 and from Microsoft 365 to the app.

oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and write Work IQ settings on behalf of the signed-in user.
oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read and write Work IQ settings on behalf of the user
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read and write Work IQ settings on your behalf.
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDisplayName: Read and write Work IQ settings

oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDescription: Allows the app to read Work IQ settings on behalf of the signed-in user.
oauth2PermissionScopes.adminConsentDisplayName: Read Work IQ settings on behalf of the user
oauth2PermissionScopes.userConsentDescription: Allows the app to read Work IQ settings on your behalf.
